steps.title: Find the sum of heights for each data set
steps.content: First, find the total height for each set: $$75 \times 32 = 2400$$ meters for set A and $$50 \times 62 = 3100$$ meters for set B.

steps.title: Compute the combined mean
steps.content:
Then add the sums and divide by the total number of buildings: $$(2400+3100) \div (75+50) = 5500 \div 125 = 44$$ meters.
The answer is 44.
